name: sac-language-support
description: VS Code extension providing language support and improved developer workflow for SaC (Single Assignment C), including syntax highlighting and compiler diagnostics.

sac.diagnostics.mode.description: When to run diagnostics through sac2c.

sac.diagnostics.debounceMs.description: Debounce used for onType diagnostics mode.

sac.diagnostics.presentation.description: Controls diagnostic rendering style: all raw entries (expanded), one actionable entry per chain (smart), or smart plus local context entries (hybrid).

sac.diagnostics.includeRelatedInformatio.description: Attach compiler origin and stack-like context as related information in hover/Problems details.

sac.diagnostics.includeStackInMessage.description: Include short origin and call-stack hints directly inside diagnostic messages.

sac.diagnostics.maxStackFrames.description: Maximum number of context frames used in smart/hybrid diagnostics.

sac.diagnostics.workspaceScan.enabled.description: Enable automatic workspace-wide diagnostics scanning for .sac files.

sac.diagnostics.workspaceScan.onInitiali.description: Run workspace-wide diagnostics scan when the language server initializes.

sac.diagnostics.workspaceScan.onConfigur.description: Run workspace-wide diagnostics scan after configuration changes.

sac.diagnostics.workspaceScan.excludeDir.description: Directory names to skip during recursive workspace diagnostics scan.

sac.compiler.channel.description: Which sac2c channel to prefer: bundled stable, bundled develop, or system PATH.

sac.compiler.path.description: Absolute path to sac2c executable. If set, this overrides channel resolution.

sac.compiler.executionBackend.description: How to execute sac2c: local process, through WSL, or in Docker.

sac.compiler.wsl.distribution.description: Optional WSL distribution name used when executionBackend is 'wsl'.

sac.compiler.docker.image.description: Docker image that contains sac2c. Required when executionBackend is 'docker'.

sac.compiler.docker.runArgs.description: Additional docker run arguments when executionBackend is 'docker'.

sac.compiler.extraArgs.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to sac2c when running diagnostics.

sac.compiler.messaging.enabled.description: Enable compiler messaging format arguments for deterministic diagnostics parsing.

sac.compiler.messaging.args.description: Arguments used to request stable GNU-style diagnostics output from sac2c.

sac.compiler.fallbackToSystem.description: If bundled channel binary is missing, fallback to sac2c from PATH.

sac.compiler.trace.description: Trace communication between VS Code and the SaC language server.
